case_title: BRIAN HOSUNG KANG VS. GEORGE HAWAWINI

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HAWAWINI, GEORGE

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANG, BRIAN HOSUNG AS TO DEFENDANT HAWAWINI, GEORGE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANG, BRIAN HOSUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAWAWINI, GEORGE $7,195.60 PRINCIPAL, $2.03 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,422.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
